sections.paragraph:
περίθεσις, εως, ἡ (περιτίθημι; Arrian, Anab. 7, 22; Sext. Emp., Pyrrh. 3, 15; Jos., Ant. 19, 30; Sym. Ps 31:9) putting on or around as an act of wearing, putting on π. χρυσίων the putting on or wearing of gold ornaments 1 Pt 3:3.—DELG s.v. τίθημι.

Arrian Arrian = Flavius Arrianus, I–II a.d.—List 5

Sext. Emp. Sext. Emp. = Sextus Empiricus, II–III a.d.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Sym. Sym. = Symmachus, Greek version of the OT—List 2, beg., 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 801
